faq.title: よくある質問
faq.subtitle: Re-Baliマーケットプレイスについて

q1.a: Re-Bali is a trusted marketplace for buying and selling goods and services in Bali, Indonesia. All transactions happen through our secure in-app chat system.

q2.q: How do I post a listing?
q2.a: Sign up, click 'Publish', fill in your item details, upload photos, and your listing goes live after a quick review. You can post up to 3-5 listings depending on your account age.

q3.a: Buyers send messages through our built-in chat. Your personal phone number stays private until you decide to share it.

q4.a: When you agree on a price, the seller closes the deal, and the buyer confirms. Both parties can then leave reviews. Payments happen directly between buyer and seller.

q5.a: Yes! Posting listings and messaging is free. Optional premium features like boosts and VIP status can be purchased with points or IDR.

q1.q: How does the trust score work?
q1.a: Your trust score is calculated from account age, completed deals, positive reviews, and verification status. Higher scores unlock badges like 'Safe Seller' and 'Trusted Pro'.

q2.a: We use content moderation, image duplicate detection, phone verification, identity verification, and automatic flagging of suspicious accounts. Listings with 3+ scam reports are auto-archived.

q3.a: Yes. Visit their profile and tap 'Block'. Their listings and messages will be hidden from you. You can unblock anytime from your Blocked Users page.

q4.q: How do I report a suspicious listing?
q4.a: Tap the 'Report' button on any listing. Choose a reason (scam, prohibited, spam, etc.) and we'll review it within 24 hours.

q1.a: Re-Bali does not process payments between buyers and sellers. You arrange payment directly (cash, bank transfer, etc.). We provide the secure communication channel.

q2.a: Points are earned by completing deals, getting reviews, and earning badges. Spend them on boosts, VIP status, and extra listing slots in the Points Shop.

q3.q: Can I buy points with real money?
q3.a: Yes! Point packs are available for purchase in IDR through our secure payment system powered by Xendit.

q1.q: How do I verify my WhatsApp?
q1.a: Go to your Profile, enter your WhatsApp number, and we'll send a verification code via WhatsApp. Once verified, you earn the WhatsApp Verified badge and 20 points.

q2.a: Upload a government-issued ID (KTP, passport, or driving license) and a selfie. Our team reviews it within 48 hours. You earn the Identity Verified badge and 40 points.

q3.a: Yes. Verification documents are encrypted at rest, automatically purged after review, and never shared with other users. Only our admin team can access them during verification.

q1.q: How do I change my display name or avatar?
q1.a: Go to Profile, tap Edit, and update your display name or upload a new avatar photo.

q2.q: What's the difference between Private and Business accounts?
q2.a: Private accounts are for individuals (3-5 listings). Business (Pro) accounts get more listings, analytics, a business page, and priority support.

q3.q: How do I delete my account?
q3.a: Contact our support team through the Contact page. We'll process your request and delete all your data within 30 days, as required by Indonesian PDP law.
